title: Determine the exact value of R(K4-e, K4-e, K4-e; 3)
micro_paper_assessment: Main endpoint unresolved. Exact cyclic no-go on 13 vertices is a relevant theorem slice and useful boundary remark, but still too thin for the micro-paper lane by itself.
family_affinity: finite exact 3-uniform Ramsey endpoint note centered on K4-e
generalization_signal: triangle-free link plus symmetry-obstruction template should transfer to nearby small 3-uniform Ramsey endpoints, but the exact cyclic no-go statement is instance-specific
candidate_theorem_slice: No translation-invariant 3-coloring of the triples of a 13-element cyclic group avoids a monochromatic 3-uniform K4-e.
next_action: Use the cyclic obstruction as a structural boundary and either push the unrestricted 13-vertex contradiction via link-graph constraints or test a much smaller non-cyclic symmetry class; do not claim the full endpoint from the cyclic no-go alone.
